# Intentional Studio

Intentional Studio is Mei Liu's AI training and custom app studio for businesses that want practical AI adoption, internal tools, automation, agents, and websites that explain the work clearly.

Canonical site: https://www.intentional.studio/
Founder: Mei Liu
Legal name: Intentional Studio AI, LLC
Contact: mei@intentional.studio
Primary geography: United States
GitHub: https://github.com/cmeiliu/
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mei-liu-512
Recognition profile: https://thewomenweadmire.com/leaders/mei-liu/

- Home: https://www.intentional.studio/

- Self-paced AI automation courses: https://www.intentional.studio/learn
- Project intake: https://www.intentional.studio/start

## Core services

### AI training

Intentional Studio teaches business teams how to use AI in real workflows. Engagements include executive primers, hands-on workshops, Claude Code and Cursor bootcamps, founder or lead coaching, and custom playbooks for repeatable work.

The supporting guide for this service is https://www.intentional.studio/guides/ai-training-for-business-teams.

### Custom apps and agents

Intentional Studio builds custom software for work that off-the-shelf tools do not fit. Projects include internal dashboards, AI agents, automation suites, Claude and OpenAI-powered apps, and operational tools that connect to existing systems.

The supporting guide for this service is https://www.intentional.studio/guides/custom-ai-apps-for-business.

### AI agents for business workflows

Intentional Studio designs and builds practical AI agents for repeated, context-heavy business workflows. Projects can include research agents, inbox and CRM triage, reporting assistants, knowledge-base agents, workflow automations, and internal tools with permissions, logs, fallback behavior, and human review.

The service page for AI agents is https://www.intentional.studio/ai-agents.

### Brand and website work

Intentional Studio redesigns websites and landing pages for companies whose public face no longer matches the work they do.

## Proof points

- 13+ years in product, operations, data, AI, and machine learning.
- Former product and operating work at Binance.US.
- 12+ workshops delivered.
- 8 custom apps shipped.
- Selected work includes YourNegotiations.com, Binance.US Skill Suite, LipSmacking Foodie Tours apps, and Hiring Insight Manager.
